label: Neuroscience & cognitive science

node.label: Neuroscience & cognitive science
node.definition: Neural coding, plasticity, memory, perception, and cognition provide biological inspiration and comparative models of intelligence.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Neuroscience & cognitive science is modeled as depending on Probability theory, Dynamical systems & control theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity.
examples: atlas downstream link to Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Dynamical systems & control theory.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Neuroscience & cognitive science has a `requires` dependency on Probability theory with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Neuroscience & cognitive science has a `requires` dependency on Dynamical systems & control theory with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Neuroscience & cognitive science has a `requires` dependency on Signal processing & harmonic analysis with `common` strength.

sentence_units.text: Neural coding, plasticity, memory, perception, and cognition provide biological inspiration and comparative models of intelligence.

In this atlas graph, Neuroscience & cognitive science is modeled as depending on Probability theory, Dynamical systems & control theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity.
